name: elevenlabs-live-waveform
title: Live Audio Waveform
author: ElevenLabs UI
description: Draws a responsive microphone waveform with static and scrolling modes plus processing state.

changes: Changed project aliases to bundled source-local imports and normalized formatting.
Added native reduced-motion detection so synthetic processing and idle loops render once instead of running continuously.
Removed the unrelated site URL helper, kept the upstream cn utility, normalized formatting, and made the closure source-local.

modifications.change: Changed project aliases to bundled source-local imports and normalized formatting. Added native reduced-motion detection so synthetic processing and idle loops render once instead of running continuously.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component install-complete, source-local, accessible, and production-safe without changing its core upstream design.
